heading: Rule of construction
label: 8930 Rule of construction
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as an authorization for the use of military force.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act or an amendment made by this Act”, meaning , , , which enacted this chapter and provisions set out as a note under . did not make any amendments.Pub.
